message:
chore: update dependencies (chrono, toml, clap, criterion, uuid, GH Actions)

Cargo dependency updates:
- chrono: 0.4.43 -> 0.4.44
- toml: 0.9.8 -> 1.0.3 (API-compatible major bump)
- clap: 4.5.54 -> 4.5.60
- criterion: 0.8.1 -> 0.8.2
- uuid: 1.19.0 -> 1.21.0

GitHub Actions updates:
- actions/upload-artifact: v4 -> v7
- dawidd6/action-download-artifact: v6 -> v16
- actions/attest-build-provenance: v2 -> v4

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -48,7 +48,7 @@ jobs:
           cache-on-failure: true
 
       - name: Download baseline (if exists)
-        uses: dawidd6/action-download-artifact@v6
+        uses: dawidd6/action-download-artifact@v16
         with:
           workflow: bench.yml
           branch: main
@@ -102,7 +102,7 @@ jobs:
           path: bench-summary.md
 
       - name: Upload benchmark results
-        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
+        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v7
         with:
           name: benchmark-results
           path: |
@@ -113,7 +113,7 @@ jobs:
 
       - name: Save baseline (main branch only)
         if: github.ref == 'refs/heads/main' && github.event_name == 'push'
-        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
+        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v7
         with:
           name: benchmark-baseline
           path: bench-output.log

@@ -117,7 +117,7 @@ jobs:
       - name: Generate coverage
         run: cargo llvm-cov --all-features --workspace --lcov --output-path lcov.info
       - name: Upload coverage artifact
-        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
+        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v7
         with:
           name: coverage-report
           path: lcov.info

@@ -50,7 +50,7 @@ jobs:
         run: cargo build --release
 
       - name: Upload binary
-        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
+        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v7
         with:
           name: ms-binary
           path: target/release/ms
@@ -110,7 +110,7 @@ jobs:
           fi
 
       - name: Upload E2E logs
-        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
+        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v7
         if: always()
         with:
           name: e2e-logs
@@ -192,7 +192,7 @@ jobs:
           echo "All robot mode tests passed!"
 
       - name: Upload robot mode logs
-        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
+        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v7
         if: always()
         with:
           name: robot-mode-logs

@@ -182,7 +182,7 @@ jobs:
           Compress-Archive -Path dist/* -DestinationPath ${{ env.BINARY_NAME }}-${{ needs.validate.outputs.version }}-${{ matrix.target }}.zip
 
       - name: Upload artifact
-        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
+        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v7
         with:
           name: ${{ env.BINARY_NAME }}-${{ matrix.target }}
           path: ${{ env.BINARY_NAME }}-${{ needs.validate.outputs.version }}-${{ matrix.target }}.${{ matrix.archive }}
@@ -222,7 +222,7 @@ jobs:
           cat SHA256SUMS.txt
 
       - name: Generate artifact attestations
-        uses: actions/attest-build-provenance@v2
+        uses: actions/attest-build-provenance@v4
         with:
           subject-path: 'release/*'
